# Overview

Brief description of changes.

## 🏷️ Type
- [ ] ✨ Feature: Adds or enhances functionality
- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix: Resolves an issue
- [ ] 📚 Documentation: Improves docs
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor: Code restructuring
- [ ] 🧪 Testing: Adds or improves tests
- [ ] ⚡ Performance: Optimizes code
- [ ] 📦 Dependencies: Updates packages
- [ ] 🏗️ Infrastructure: Changes to project structure/CI

## ✅ Checklist
- [ ] 🧪 Tests added/updated and passing locally
- [ ] 📚 Documentation updated (if needed)
- [ ] ✅ Type hints included for new code
- [ ] 🔍 Code reviewed for security considerations
- [ ] ⚠️ Breaking changes documented (if any)
- [ ] 🧹 Code cleaned up (no debug prints, unused imports)
